specializations: Sustainable sourcing and traceable botanical biotechnology
product_highlights: In Cell'Up™ — plant cell culture technology for rare and endangered botanical actives
BioTech Rose — bio-identical rose damascenone produced via fermentation technology
Traceable botanical extracts with blockchain-verified supply chain
Upcycled agricultural by-product biotech actives for circular beauty
notes: Robertet Group is a family-owned French fragrance and flavor company that has evolved into a significant biotech botanical ingredient supplier through its In Cell'Up™ plant cell culture platform and fermentation-based active development. Their traceable, sustainably sourced botanical biotech actives — including upcycled agricultural by-products — align strongly with the circular beauty movement and sustainability demands of premium cosmetic brands. Robertet's unique combination of traditional botanical expertise and modern biotechnology makes them a distinctive SKIN-TWIN reference for clean-label, traceable biotech botanical actives.
